# Scorz - Competition Management Platform

Scorz is a comprehensive competition management platform designed for pageants, talent shows, speech contests, and any judged event. It handles the entire competition lifecycle from registration through certified results.

## Purpose
Scorz enables organizers to create and manage competitions with custom rubrics, real-time scoring, audience voting, and automated result certification. Judges score contestants using customizable criteria, tabulators manage timing and verification, and contestants can register and track their progress.

## Key Features
- **Event Management**: Create competitions with levels, sub-events, and custom scoring rules
- **Registration**: Online contestant registration with profiles and digital signatures
- **Judging**: Real-time scoring with customizable rubrics and sliders
- **Tabulation**: Performance timing, score verification, and result certification
- **Audience Engagement**: Ticket sales, live voting, and event updates
- **Analytics**: Comprehensive reporting and performance metrics

## Supported Competition Types
- Pageants and beauty contests
- Talent shows and performances
- Speech contests and debates
- Sports competitions with judging
- Academic competitions
- Any scored competitive event

## Technology
Built with React, TypeScript, Supabase, and modern web technologies for real-time updates and scalability.

## Important Links
- Homepage: https://scorz.live
- Events: https://scorz.live/events
- Help Center: https://scorz.live/help
- About: https://scorz.live/about

## Contact
For questions about competitions or platform features, visit our help center or contact support through the platform.
